Class MatchController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server.MatchController
public class MatchController extends Object
Single server-side controller for one match. Manages the lobby (addPlayerToLobby, setExpectedPlayers, removePlayerFromLobby), starts the Game when the lobby is full, and exposes the in-match actions (placeTotem, pickCards, pickBonusCard, determineWinner). It resolves string ids to model objects and validates that the acting player is the active one.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MatchController(String matchId)
    Builds an initially empty controller: the lobby is open and no match has started yet.
    MatchController(String matchId, Game game, String hostNickname, int expectedPlayers)
    Rebuilds a controller around a game restored from disk after a server crash.

  • Constructor Details

    • MatchController

      public MatchController(String matchId)
      Builds an initially empty controller: the lobby is open and no match has started yet.
      Parameters:
      matchId - id of the match handled by this controller

    • MatchController

      public MatchController(String matchId, Game game, String hostNickname, int expectedPlayers)
      Rebuilds a controller around a game restored from disk after a server crash. The match is already past the lobby phase, so lobbyPlayers is re-populated from the game's players only to keep the two views consistent for the (unused, post-start) lobby getters.
      Parameters:
      matchId - id of the restored match
      game - the in-progress game loaded from a snapshot
      hostNickname - nickname of the original host
      expectedPlayers - number of players the match was started with

  • Method Details

    • getMatchId

      public String getMatchId()
      Returns:
      the unique id of the match handled by this controller

    • hasStarted

      public boolean hasStarted()
      Returns:
      whether the match has already started (the Game model exists)

    • getGame

      public Game getGame()
      Returns:
      the current game, or null if the match has not started

    • getHostNickname

      public String getHostNickname()
      Returns:
      the current lobby host's nickname, or null if the lobby is empty

    • getExpectedPlayers

      public int getExpectedPlayers()
      Returns:
      the number of players chosen to start the match

    • getLobbyPlayers

      public List<Player> getLobbyPlayers()
      Returns:
      a copy of the players currently in the lobby

    • addPlayerToLobby

      public void addPlayerToLobby(String nickname)
      Adds a new player to the lobby.

      Checks that the lobby is still open, that the 5-player maximum is not exceeded, and that the nickname is not already taken (case-insensitive, Locale.ROOT: "Alice" and "alice" are the same nickname, but the original casing is kept for display). The first player to join becomes the host. The totem is not assigned here: players choose it in turn during the selection phase.

      Parameters:
      nickname - nickname of the player to add

    • setExpectedPlayers

      public void setExpectedPlayers(String requesterNickname, int expectedPlayers)
      Lets the host choose the total number of expected players.

      The number must be between 2 and 5 and not less than the number of players already connected to the lobby.

      Parameters:
      requesterNickname - nickname of the requester
      expectedPlayers - desired number of players for the match

    • removePlayerFromLobby

      public void removePlayerFromLobby(String nickname)
      Removes a player from the lobby.

      If the host leaves, the new host is the first remaining player. If the expected number is no longer consistent with the players present, it is reset and must be chosen again.

      Parameters:
      nickname - nickname of the player to remove

    • isSelectingTotem

      public boolean isSelectingTotem()
      Returns:
      true if the lobby is in the totem-selection phase (lobby full, match not started yet, players choosing their colour in turn)

    • getTotemPalette

      public List<String> getTotemPalette()
      Returns:
      the immutable list of selectable totem colours

    • getCurrentTotemChooser

      public String getCurrentTotemChooser()
      Returns:
      the nickname of the player whose turn it is to choose a totem, or null if not in the selection phase

    • chooseTotem

      public void chooseTotem(String nickname, String color)
      Assigns the totem colour chosen by the current player and advances the selection. When the last player has chosen, the match starts.

      Checks that the selection phase is in progress, that it is really the indicated player's turn (join order), that the colour is in the palette, and that the colour has not already been taken by another player.

      Parameters:
      nickname - nickname of the player choosing
      color - desired totem colour

    • placeTotem

      public void placeTotem(String playerNickname, char offerLetter)
      Performs the totem-placement action on an offer tile.
      Parameters:
      playerNickname - nickname of the active player
      offerLetter - letter of the chosen tile

    • pickCards

      public void pickCards(String playerNickname, List<String> selectedCardIds)
      Performs the card-selection action for the active player.
      Parameters:
      playerNickname - nickname of the active player
      selectedCardIds - ids of the selected cards

    • pickBonusCard

      public void pickBonusCard(String playerNickname, String bonusCardId)
      Performs the end-of-round bonus card selection.
      Parameters:
      playerNickname - nickname of the active player
      bonusCardId - id of the selected bonus card

    • determineWinner

      public Player determineWinner()
      Asks the model to determine the final winner.
      Returns:
      the winning player
